---
title: "Video"
format: html
---
<iframe width="720" height="405" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/8FQNZpuIdOA?si=FXJ3zlL9NAVLq0gM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1TSY2TkTfaHW3k1ReXSmy6qyeEqEbU1xDbp3cKpmvArE/edit#slide=id" target="_blank">
  View Google Slides Presentation
</a>
